name: Tier 3 assistant confirm cancels event on dashboard
description: User schedules Tier3CancelTarget via Command Bar, cancels it through assistant confirm banner, and sees a cancellation success or undo message on the dashboard

planSteps.description: Type demo@timeora.app into the email field
Type TimeoraDemo123! into the password field
Wait for 5 seconds for the dashboard weekly calendar to load
Press Control+K or Meta+K to open the Command Bar
Type Jadwalkan Tier3CancelTarget besok jam 10 pagi selama 1 jam into the Command Bar input
Wait for 3 seconds for the new event dialog to open
Click the Save button in the event dialog
Wait for 4 seconds for the calendar to refresh
Press Control+K or Meta+K to open the Command Bar again
Type cancel Tier3CancelTarget into the Command Bar input
Wait for 3 seconds for the amber assistant confirmation banner above the calendar
Click the Confirm assistant action button inside the Assistant confirmation banner region
Wait for 3 seconds for the dashboard to update
Verify the dashboard message area above the calendar shows an event cancelled success message or an undo banner for the deleted event
